policy.omitted: Only cumulative streaming snapshots whose final semantic content is retained.
policy.rawWorkspaces: Not included. They contain transient harness profiles, credentials, repeated trace snapshots, and reproducible candidate files rather than additional model interaction evidence.
policy.redaction: Credential-shaped object values and bearer/JWT/API-key patterns are replaced with [REDACTED]; host paths are normalized.
policy.retained: Final messages, tool calls and results, usage events, session metadata, verifier diagnostics, and non-empty stderr.
policy.scope: All 60 successful run traces and all 15 turns per run.
